original_text:
### Email Canvas & Grid **[GENERAL — not specified in guide; Solstice email baseline]**
- Email body width: **600px** fixed, centered; sections must render edge-to-edge at exactly 600px so assembled sections butt cleanly.
- Mobile breakpoint: **480px**; all multi-column layouts collapse to single column.
- Internal section grid: 12-column mental model; practical layouts are 1-col, 2-col (50/50), or image/text split (≈40/60).
- **Section side padding: 24px** left/right (consistent across ALL sections — this is what makes assembly seamless). Full-bleed imagery/gradient backgrounds may run to 600px, but text within them still respects 24px insets.
- **Vertical rhythm: 8px base unit.** All padding/margins are multiples of 8.
  - Section top/bottom internal padding: **32px** (each section owns its own top AND bottom padding; no external margins between sections — assembly is zero-gap stacking).
  - Heading → body gap: 16px. Paragraph → paragraph: 16px. Body → callout/CTA: 24px. Image → caption: 8px.
- Buttons/CTA **[GENERAL, contrast-checked to palette]:** Brand Blue #00529b background, White #ffffff text, Nunito Sans Bold 16px, padding 14px 32px, **min touch target 48px height** (brand accessibility rule: ≥48px clickable areas), corner radius 24px (fully rounded pill, echoing the rounded brand aesthetic). Secondary CTA: White background, 2px Brand Blue border, Brand Blue text, same metrics. One primary CTA per section maximum.

relations.note: Cardinality limit refines the styled CTA button device defined in cta_button_style_tokens.
Both rules jointly define the assembly-ready email section baseline (canvas/grid + spacing rhythm).

quotes: Email body width: **600px** fixed, centered
Mobile breakpoint: **480px**
12-column mental model; practical layouts are 1-col, 2-col (50/50), or image/text split (≈40/60)
Email body width: **600px** fixed, centered; sections must render edge-to-edge at exactly 600px so assembled sections butt cleanly.
Mobile breakpoint: **480px**; all multi-column layouts collapse to single column.
Internal section grid: 12-column mental model; practical layouts are 1-col, 2-col (50/50), or image/text split (≈40/60).

rules.intent: Guarantee seamless section assembly and predictable responsive collapse across the email canvas.
rules.rule_text: Email canvas is fixed at 600px width, centered, with sections rendering edge-to-edge so they butt cleanly at assembly. The layout collapses to a single column at the 480px mobile breakpoint. Internal structure follows a 12-column grid, with practical layouts as 1-column, 2-column 50:50 split, or image/text 40:60 split.

quotes: Section side padding: 24px
Vertical rhythm: 8px base unit.
Section top/bottom internal padding: **32px**
Heading → body gap: 16px. Paragraph → paragraph: 16px. Body → callout/CTA: 24px. Image → caption: 8px.

Section side padding: 24px** left/right (consistent across ALL sections — this is what makes assembly seamless). Full-bleed imagery/gradient backgrounds may run to 600px, but text within them still respects 24px insets.
Vertical rhythm: 8px base unit.** All padding/margins are multiples of 8.
Section top/bottom internal padding: **32px** (each section owns its own top AND bottom padding; no external margins between sections — assembly is zero-gap stacking).
Heading → body gap: 16px. Paragraph → paragraph: 16px. Body → callout/CTA: 24px. Image → caption: 8px.

rules.intent: Ensure consistent, predictable spacing so independently authored sections assemble seamlessly without gaps or misaligned insets.
rules.rule_text: All sections share a consistent 24px side inset (section.padding.sides = 24px) — even full-bleed imagery/gradient backgrounds must keep text within this inset — and a uniform vertical rhythm built on an 8px base unit (section.padding.top_bottom = 32px). Sections own both their top and bottom padding with no external margins between them, producing zero-gap stacking at assembly. Internal gaps follow fixed spacing tokens: heading→body 16px, paragraph→paragraph 16px, body→callout/CTA 24px, image→caption 8px.

quotes: Brand Blue #00529b background, White #ffffff text, Nunito Sans Bold 16px, padding 14px 32px, **min touch target 48px height**
corner radius 24px (fully rounded pill
Secondary CTA: White background, 2px Brand Blue border, Brand Blue text, same metrics.

Buttons/CTA **[GENERAL, contrast-checked to palette]:** Brand Blue #00529b background, White #ffffff text, Nunito Sans Bold 16px, padding 14px 32px, **min touch target 48px height** (brand accessibility rule: ≥48px clickable areas), corner radius 24px (fully rounded pill, echoing the rounded brand aesthetic). Secondary CTA: White background, 2px Brand Blue border, Brand Blue text, same metrics.

rules.intent: Lock the accessible, contrast-checked CTA button system across primary and secondary variants.
rules.rule_text: Primary CTA buttons use Brand Blue fill (#00529b) with white label text, Nunito Sans Bold 16px, 14px/32px padding, a minimum 48px touch target height for accessibility, and a fully rounded 24px pill radius. Secondary CTA buttons share the same metrics but use a white background with a 2px Brand Blue border and Brand Blue label text.

quotes: One primary CTA per section maximum.
One primary CTA per section maximum.

rules.intent: Avoid competing calls to action within a single section.
rules.rule_text: No section may contain more than one primary CTA button.
